headline: 《痴迷》领跑，新片蓄势待发
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：无新片上映，但《痴迷》热度不减，《末日地堡》《福尔摩斯小姐3》等紧随其后。本周《穿普拉达的女王2》等新片将映，未来《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》等备受期待。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' remains hot, followed by 'Silo' and 'Enola Holmes 3'. New films like 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' drop this week, with 'Spider-Man: Freshman Year' upcoming.

industryHighlights.text: 本周无新片上映，市场静待新片潮
industryHighlights.en: No new releases this week; market awaits upcoming wave.

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》本周上映引期待
industryHighlights.en: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' drops this week, generating buzz.

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》官宣制作中

industryHighlights.en: 'The Odyssey' live-action film gets release date.
